programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Two 19-year-olds take their first steps into the dating world together. A hip-hop artist meets another musician. And can weightlifter Jack give bodybuilder Eloise a lift?

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Young Henry has been accidentally hit by a forklift truck driven by his dad. Best mates Dean and Nahum are reeling from a car crash. And 94-year-old Pearl has badly cut her arm by trapping it in a lift.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Liv Sargeant decides to kick things off with a sophisticated evening in Bath, complete with black tie dress code, which goes down better with some guests than others.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Second to host in the Roman Spa town of Bath is ex-raver and single mum Mel Lewis-Leger. Mel's treating her guests to a night of Cajun food and an `old school' rave party.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It's day three of the competition in Bath and the turn of handyman Jon Wicheard to wow his four guests. Jon is a man of simple, yet strange taste, bemusing his fellow diners by dousing all his meals in his special sauce: tomato ketchup.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fourth to host in Bath is café worker Becky Tyler. With her day job heavily influencing her choice of starter, Becky sets out to put on a menu of great British fare.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It's the final day of the competition in Bath and it's the turn of patriotic Frenchman Denis Verrier. Working in the hospitality industry, Denis is pretty confident he knows what it takes to throw an amazing dinner party.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Chelmsford, the first to host is `yummy mummy' Alex Sullivan, who aims to win over her diners with a birthday party-themed night.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On day two of the competition in Chelmsford, our second host is 40-year-old businessman Scott Johnson. Scott's going all out on presentation of his `Essex Glam' themed night.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It's day three of the competition in Chelmsford, and 41-year-old married mum Deb Croghan hopes to impress with a saucy `tarts and vicars' style party.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Amateur theatrics take centre stage on the fourth night of the week's competition in Chelmsford. Hot-tub salesman and host John Mabey's Shakespeare-themed party features Italian food, but not necessarily as `mama' used to make.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It's the final night in Chelmsford, and self-proclaimed Essex boy Martin Young is throwing a Caribbean-themed night for his four guests.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Wiltshire, Andrew and David host a ritzy affair, but Andrew's celebrity name-dropping fails to impress, and the guests are horrified by David's collection of Victorian hair clippings.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: First to host in Swindon are fashion-conscious Carla and Hayley, who serve up a Caribbean-themed menu. They are followed by self-confessed food snob Jeanette and her husband Rob, and day three sees Tim and Kath hosting their very first dinner party.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Leah Charles-King is in Spain's Mar Menor to help Eileen from Birmingham find the perfect holiday home. Eileen ideally wants a two-bedroom apartment near the beach, and with a maximum budget of £43,500, Leah lines up five great options.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Karen and Brian are taking the leap and following their dream of making a permanent move to the Málaga province in southern Spain. Leah Charles-King shows them what their £120k can buy.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Joanne and former bodybuilding champion Darren hope to find the perfect holiday home on Spain's eastern Costa del Sol. Can Jean Johansson find a strong enough contender for their £180k?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Barbara and Leigh met in Cyprus years ago, and now they want a holiday home there to suit the whole family. Can Ben show them a property that's an ideal match?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: We catch up with Steph and Tana in Edinburgh; did they get the family home they were after? And in Derbyshire, did Wendy and Simon find the picture-perfect place they craved?

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Pep and Malene plan to build a modern Viking Hall in the Surrey Hills. Following Pep's cancer diagnosis, it's a race to create a house that cherishes their memories and life together.

programme.title: Britain's Most Expensive Houses
programme.desc: Agent Diana is set to look at a Mayfair property that could sell for a staggering £100 million when it is renovated, and there is already a buyer.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies is the 'Taskmaster' in this game show that challenges the wit and wisdom of five comedians, who are all putting their reputations on the line. Alex Horne assists Davies in setting up unique and ridiculous tasks for the competitors.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britain's sharpest armchair critics share more of their sharp, insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the week's biggest and best shows on television.

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Some of Britain's best loved famous faces share their sharp, insightful, funny and emotional views on popular and topical TV shows. From Saturday night entertainment juggernauts to the week's biggest news stories, celebs become opinionated viewers.

programme.title: North to Alaska
programme.desc: A comic tale of love set in the gold fields of turn-of-the-century Alaska, where two prospectors have made a fortune. One is about to marry and while he puts the finishing touches to the honeymoon cabin, the other travels to Seattle to collect the bride. When the latter discovers that the girl has married someone else, he decides to find his partner another bride.

programme.desc: When we meet somebody everywhere we go, we say hello. Ciao, Konnichi wa, Marhaba - Hello has different names - in Italian, Japanese or Arabic. Let's greet our friends from all around the world with a nice hello in their language.

programme.title: Timeshift
programme.sub-title: Hurricanes and Heatwaves: The Highs and Lows of British Weather

programme.title: The World About Us
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the long, hot summer of 1976, the driest for two centuries. It was seen by many as a year of disaster for the countryside. But was it really?

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Documentary from 1976 that explores the drought crisis of that year, going behind the scenes to discover its impact on farming, the landscape and industrial and domestic consumers.

programme.title: The Summer of 76!
programme.desc: The most famous heatwave of the century was in 1976 and these are the red hot hits that soundtracked that summer. Including `Dancing Queen', `Jeans On', `Devil Woman' and `Combine Harvester'.

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: Hyacinth is anxious that her neighbours view the arrival of her new suite, proudly boasting that it's an exact replica of one at Sandringham House, but the rest of the family conduct themselves rather less than regally.

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: Hyacinth's plan to take Daddy on a picnic backfires when he takes the car, leaving the rest of the family stranded.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: In the mysterious world of the Nethersphere, plans have been drawn. Missy is about to come face-to-face with the Doctor, and an impossible choice is looming.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: With Cybermen on the streets of London, old friends unite against old enemies, and the Doctor takes to the air in a startling new role. Can the mighty UNIT contain Missy?

programme.title: Miranda
programme.desc: Penny is threatening to cancel Miranda's Christmas if she does not sort her life out. Amongst other things, she forces her daughter on a detox. Meanwhile, Stevie has a new executive job and Miranda tries to follow her in to an office job but it all proves too much. Meanwhile, are Gary and Miranda able to just be friends?

programme.title: Miranda
programme.desc: Penny embarrasses Miranda by running for local councillor with Tilly as her wingman. Gary has put himself on the dating scene and Miranda decides she has to do the same - they both want dates for Stevie's birthday party. Will they find partners or end up back in each other's company? The result is a big surprise for Stevie.

programme.title: Mrs Brown's Boys
programme.desc: Suspicion surrounds Cathy's creepy boyfriend, Boris. Buster and Dermot are convinced he is a vampire and hatch a plan to save Cathy, which leaves her mortified. Sharon has boyfriend troubles of her own, and Father Damien has been called away to tend to some depressed chickens. Meanwhile, Buster convinces Agnes she should have her antique vase valued.

programme.title: Mrs Brown's Boys
programme.desc: Mrs Brown and the gang start the New Year by attempting a tough new health and fitness regime. New year, new Agnes!

programme.title: Funboys
programme.desc: The three funboys, Callum Brown, Jordan McCafferty and Lorcan Boggin, may have taken the scenic route through emotional development but they're trying to make the most of life in rural Ballymacnoose. While working at the local shop, Callum acquires his first-ever female admirer in the form of Gemma, who is new to town and seeking friends. Unfortunately, Callum's burgeoning relationship means that he no longer wants to play video games all weekend with the fellas.

programme.title: Funboys
programme.sub-title: Once Upon a Time in Ballymacnoose
programme.desc: After a gas leak at his flat, Callum moves in with Lorcan and his dad, Sammy, aka the biggest git in Ballymacnoose. Driven by a desire to no longer be a pushover and in a desperate attempt to get over his break-up with Gemma, Callum goes under Sammy's wing and unleashes his own inner git. Meanwhile, Jordan's two dads are finally tying the knot and Jordan is caught up in all the excitement of the wedding.

programme.title: Funboys
programme.desc: With Callum now unwelcome at Boggins' farm and his flat still out of bounds because of a gas leak, he turns once more to his oldest and dearest friend, Jordan. Things seem to be going well and Jordan's two dads show Callum some much-needed sympathy.

programme.title: Funboys
programme.desc: Gemma and Lorcan throw a party at Boggins' farm and it is the biggest social event in Ballymacnoose with a whole eight people attending. Callum makes a new friend but there is a catch.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Donna needs a man so her mum won't think she's repellent to the opposite sex. Janet wants to help, but discovers that matchmaking can seriously damage your boyfriend.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Jonny tries to be horrible to Janet and fails miserably. Donna is after as much sex with as little commitment as possible. Flo, however, has other plans, and Louise discovers that dieting can damage the buttocks.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Gaz finds Donna's toothbrush in his flat and realises he has to stop her merging, and Janet's plan to make Jonny fancy her backfires.

programme.desc: George spars in the boxing gym, but things take a turn. Ian struggles with recent events. And Denise is urged to start treatment.

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Kat plans a birthday dinner for Jasmine, Oscar wrestles with the feelings he has for both Josh and Jasmine, and Jack tries to get through to Denise.

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Ian seeks redemption, Nicola is determined to help George, and the Slaters gather for the birthday dinner.

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Chaos erupts at The Vic, Chelsea's world is turned upside down, and George and Gina try to clear the air.

programme.title: A Good Girl's Guide to Murder
programme.desc: A daring night mission causes group tension and isolates Pip. Jamie's case stalls until Pip decodes a clue that cracks it wide open. In court, the verdict is given.

programme.title: A Good Girl's Guide to Murder
programme.desc: As they chase the truth, Pip and her friends face new risks and shocking discoveries. Will they find Jamie and make it through unharmed?

programme.title: Wedding Crashers
programme.desc: John Beckwith and Jeremy Grey are a pair of committed philanderers who sneak into weddings in a bid to pick up women.

programme.title: Disclosure
programme.desc: Kirsty Craib believes she has ADHD and has spent the last eight years trying to get assessed, without success. Many young women report experiencing the same struggles getting support for neurodiverse conditions. On a journey towards trying to have her condition recognised, Kirsty meets others whose delayed diagnosis has impacted their lives, and asks whether social media, while contributing to more awareness, is also making it more difficult to get help.

programme.title: Gaia: A Death on Dancing Ledge
programme.desc: This episode tells the story of Gaia going missing from her aunt's house just before sunset on a November evening in 2017. Just before she leaves, she makes a last-minute call to her identical twin sister, Maya, then she runs. She's alone without a coat, phone or medication for her epilepsy and in a state of high distress. After making several emergency calls to police, Gaia's family believe that a widespread search for her is underway.

programme.title: Gaia: A Death on Dancing Ledge
programme.desc: In episode two, Zara McDermott digs deeper into the world that Gaia unwittingly stepped into after she was approached online by an older man. Zara discovers how, in 2014, when Gaia was 16, she was approached by a man five years older than her online, who had a reputation in the local area. Despite multiple warnings from those closest to her, Gaia wanted to help him and they became close.

programme.title: Gaia: A Death on Dancing Ledge
programme.desc: Zara McDermott discovers that Gaia's alleged attacker contacted her ten months before she went missing. As her older sister Clara says, the texts were 'inherently threatening' and triggered a mental health crisis. As her attempts to get a restraining order were declined, Gaia spiralled. Within a month of receiving the texts, Gaia was in hospital, sectioned under the Mental Health Act for her own safety.

programme.title: Zara McDermott
programme.sub-title: The Idaho Murders: Trial by TikTok
programme.desc: Zara McDermott heads to the USA and the small college town of Moscow, Idaho to find out about the tragic murder of four students and the global online manhunt that followed their deaths.

programme.desc: MasterChef 2026 has seen seven weeks of competition, all leading to this one moment: it's the final, and one of the three exceptional cooks remaining will be taking home the trophy.

programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two.

programme.desc: Pancake is persuaded by Nugget to have a massive birthday party, but when the bash grows increasingly over the top, he finds his own unique way to handle the pressure.

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.desc: When a meteorite splashes into the sea, Dad and Cosima cause problems by claiming it in the name of science, against the wishes of the sea creatures.

programme.title: Super Happy Magic Forest

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: A rocket carries the cabin into space.

programme.title: Duck and Frog

programme.title: Blue Peter
programme.sub-title: Kidzbop, Irish Dance Superstar and Women's World Cup Cricket!
programme.desc: Packed full of amazing celeb guests, epic challenges and lols galore!

programme.title: Newsround
programme.desc: News magazine keeping young viewers up to date with the latest stories and events happening at home and abroad.

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.sub-title: Wonders of the Isle of Wight
programme.desc: Joe Crowley, Margherita Taylor and Adam Henson explore a side of the Isle of Wight few visitors ever see. Beyond the beaches and bustling holiday towns, the island's rare geology and southerly location have shaped a landscape rich in surprises, from unusual marine life and distinctive habitats to crops more often associated with warmer climates.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: As summer hits its stride at Longmeadow, Monty Don brings a burst of colour to the Jewel Garden. Arit Anderson visits a striking garden in Greater Manchester packed with clever design solutions.

programme.title: The Great Caruso
programme.desc: The life of opera star Enrico Caruso, from his childhood in Naples to his reign as one of the world's greatest tenors.

programme.title: The Importance of Being Earnest
programme.desc: Screen adaptation of Oscar Wilde's comic masterpiece. Set in 1890s England, a comedy of mistaken identity ensues when two gentlemen friends use the same alias to pursue the women they love.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Featuring short-lease flats in London and Leicestershire, and a terrace in Larkfield in Kent. There are plenty of twists and turns as the projects get away.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Join Natasha Raskin Sharp for today's show from Builth Wells in Powys, mid Wales. Experts Ben Cooper and Kate Bliss help two red and blue teams, who each have £300 each to spend on three items. Natasha pays a visit to the nearby town of Llanwrtyd Wells, where she has a go at the local sport of bog snorkelling. At the auction, there's great excitement, but which team will be victorious?

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: A Mexican village is at the mercy of Calvera, the leader of a band of outlaws. The townspeople, too afraid to fight for themselves, hire seven American gunslingers to free them from the bandits' raids. The professional gunmen train the villagers to defend themselves, then plan a trap for the evil Calvera.

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Experts Mark Stacey and Catherine Southon choose items to take to auction. Mark Stacey meets someone with an eye for a bargain and Catherine is taken by a wonderful pink rolls Royce! Presenter Paul Martin visits the birthplace of one of his heroes, a Welshman who took Hollywood by storm.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: The queen African honeybee rules the savannah, even elephants panic at the buzzing of her hive. This recreates the life of the queen and her colony as they fight to survive. Ground-breaking close-up photography shows a bee-eye view of their world, from the queen murdering her sisters to fighting off giant invaders and eventually migrating across the savannah to the great Mount Kenya.

programme.title: Trooping the Colour
programme.desc: Highlights of 2026's Trooping the Colour ceremony.

programme.title: 40 Originals at the BBC: Volume 2
programme.desc: Another celebration of the original outings of 40 classic songs that were so good, it was inevitable that they'd end up being covered by others.

programme.title: 40 Originals at the BBC
programme.desc: A compilation of songs that became bigger hits for the artists who covered them, but these are the incredible original versions, with artists including Gladys Knight and Dolly Parton.

programme.title: Nostalgia
programme.desc: After forty years spent between Lebanon and Egypt, the entrepreneur Felice returns to Naples. Here he meets Don Luigi, a priest who fights the Camorra and tries to give a better future to the young people of the town.

programme.title: Death Valley
programme.desc: John and Janie arrive at a New Age commune to investigate the murder of its founder. Janie hopes for a swift resolution, as one member is an unwelcome, familiar face from her past.

programme.title: Football's New Generation
programme.desc: The intimate story of England's newest recruits, charting their rise from grassroots heroes to Europe's biggest stage. Featuring Cole Palmer, Kobbie Mainoo, Ollie Watkins and Marc Guehi, the documentary reveals their personal stories for the first time, with contributions from their loved ones, family and friends, as well as the veterans who mentored them to the world stage.

programme.title: This Is BBC TWO
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two.

programme.title: Beechgrove Garden
programme.desc: Beechgrove Garden is full of information for gardeners across the country who have to cope with the colder climates of the UK.

programme.title: Landward
programme.desc: Dougie is in East Sutherland to find out about the challenges of modern crofting, and Shahbaz visits the Bone Caves in Assynt to see how an increase in visitor numbers is damaging the site.

programme.title: MOTD FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Coverage of the Group C match between Haiti and Scotland from Boston Stadium. Scotland seek a winning start in their first World Cup for 28 years, while Haiti's previous appearance was in 1974.

programme.title: Saturday Kitchen Best Bites
programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt serves up a feast of food from Theo Randall, Ching-He Huang and Georgina Hayden. Meanwhile, Rick Stein and the Hairy Bikers head out of the studio.

programme.title: Strangers on a Train
programme.desc: Alfred Hitchcock's classic about two men who plot a perfect murder. When tennis pro Guy Haines meets smooth-talking Bruno Antony in the bar car of a train, he finds the stranger sympathetic with his desire to be rid of his clinging wife. The sinister Bruno then proposes that they swap murders: Bruno will murder Guy's wife, and Guy will do away with Bruno's father.

programme.title: Dial M for Murder
programme.desc: A playboy ex-tennis star arranges to have his wife killed, fearing that he is about to lose her - and her fortune - to another man. When the murder goes wrong, the ruthless husband is willing to do anything to save his own skin.

programme.title: Talking Pictures
programme.desc: A retrospective look at television appearances made over the years by iconic Hollywood director Alfred Hitchcock, reflecting on the milestones and highlights of his life and career. Narrated by Sylvia Syms.

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: The team travel up and down the country revisiting some of the historic venues from the series, as well as new valuations and unexpected auctions. Paul Martin visits the beautiful Cotswolds village of Broadway to uncover its artistic past.

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: In Newtonmore, in the Cairngorms, Robert MacKenzie needs to gather in all his pregnant cows back to the croft for pregnancy testing. Costs of feed and fertiliser have shot up, so if not enough are in calf, it may be time to stop farming cattle.

programme.title: Expedition Killer Whale
programme.desc: A team of scientists and filmmakers heads to Antarctica to study the most sophisticated hunts in the animal kingdom - killer whales making waves to wash seals off floating ice.

programme.title: Hidden Treasures of the National Trust
programme.desc: Every year millions of us flock to the homes and gardens of the National Trust. But out of sight of visitors lies a hidden world. Behind closed doors, dedicated teams are battling to keep priceless heritage alive.

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve joins forces with shark scientist Mauricio Hoyos to discover where shark mothers give birth and help protect a new generation of these ocean giants in the Eastern Pacific.

programme.title: The Mother of All Cons
programme.desc: Meg's funeral is cancelled for a new autopsy, and the sleuths learn that there was no brain tumour. Meg's half-sister suspects their mother knows more and begins a search for answer.

programme.title: Later ... with Jools Holland
programme.desc: With Lola Young, Mike D 5D, Baby Rose, Wasia Project, Beverly Glenn-Copeland and Elizabeth Copeland, and Bonnie 'Prince' Billy.

programme.title: Children of Men
programme.desc: In England 2027, worldwide infertility has left the population on the brink of extinction and all hope of a cure is lost. However, underground activist Julian shows up with a miraculously pregnant girl.

programme.title: BlacKkKlansman
programme.desc: Ron Stallworth is the first African-American detective to serve in the Colorado Springs Police Department. Determined to make a name for himself, Stallworth bravely sets out on a dangerous mission: infiltrate and expose the Ku Klux Klan. The detective soon recruits a more seasoned colleague, Flip Zimmerman, into the undercover investigation of a lifetime. Together, they team up to take down the extremist hate group as the organization aims to sanitize its rhetoric to appeal to the mainstream.

programme.title: Southbank at 75: You Are Here
programme.desc: An epic dance spectacular to mark London's Southbank Centre's anniversary, forming an electrifying journey through 75 years of British youth culture.

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve heads to the Moukalaba Doudou National Park in Gabon. Alongside primatologists and jungle experts, he wants to discover whether this unexplored rainforest could be home to an undiscovered population of chimpanzees.

programme.title: MasterChef
programme.desc: MasterChef 2026 has seen seven weeks of competition, all leading to this one moment: it's the final, and one of the three exceptional cooks remaining will be taking home the trophy.

programme.title: This Is BBC TWO
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two.

programme.title: Piripenguins
programme.desc: Pancake is persuaded by Nugget to have a massive birthday party, but when the bash grows increasingly over the top, he finds his own unique way to handle the pressure.

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.desc: When a meteorite splashes into the sea, Dad and Cosima cause problems by claiming it in the name of science, against the wishes of the sea creatures.

programme.title: Super Happy Magic Forest
programme.desc: When the heroes are faced with the Goblin King moving into the Big Birch, they decide to invent a quest that will soon have him running back home.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: A rocket carries the cabin into space.

programme.title: Duck and Frog

programme.title: Pokémon Horizons: The Series
programme.desc: With Iono's help, Dot confronts a trainer who has been playing pranks with his Stunfisk.

programme.title: Blue Peter

programme.desc: Packed full of amazing celeb guests, epic challenges and lols galore!

programme.title: Newsround
programme.desc: News magazine keeping young viewers up to date with the latest stories and events happening at home and abroad.

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.sub-title: Wonders of the Isle of Wight
programme.desc: Joe Crowley, Margherita Taylor and Adam Henson explore a side of the Isle of Wight few visitors ever see. Beyond the beaches and bustling holiday towns, the island's rare geology and southerly location have shaped a landscape rich in surprises, from unusual marine life and distinctive habitats to crops more often associated with warmer climates.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: As summer hits its stride at Longmeadow, Monty Don brings a burst of colour to the Jewel Garden. Arit Anderson visits a striking garden in Greater Manchester packed with clever design solutions.

programme.title: The Great Caruso
programme.desc: The life of opera star Enrico Caruso, from his childhood in Naples to his reign as one of the world's greatest tenors.

programme.title: The Importance of Being Earnest
programme.desc: Screen adaptation of Oscar Wilde's comic masterpiece. Set in 1890s England, a comedy of mistaken identity ensues when two gentlemen friends use the same alias to pursue the women they love.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Featuring short-lease flats in London and Leicestershire, and a terrace in Larkfield in Kent. There are plenty of twists and turns as the projects get away.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Join Natasha Raskin Sharp for today's show from Builth Wells in Powys, mid Wales. Experts Ben Cooper and Kate Bliss help two red and blue teams, who each have £300 each to spend on three items. Natasha pays a visit to the nearby town of Llanwrtyd Wells, where she has a go at the local sport of bog snorkelling. At the auction, there's great excitement, but which team will be victorious?

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: A Mexican village is at the mercy of Calvera, the leader of a band of outlaws. The townspeople, too afraid to fight for themselves, hire seven American gunslingers to free them from the bandits' raids. The professional gunmen train the villagers to defend themselves, then plan a trap for the evil Calvera.

programme.desc: Throughout history, humans have buried their dead in caves or chambers, in pyramids or in some form of a tomb; ancient tombs were visual memorials for the dead; in China, a vast necropolis was constructed as a way to connect to the afterlife.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner
programme.desc: There are stories of advanced technology from the ancient past that seem too impossible to be true. These technologies challenge everything humanity thought about the innovation of ancestors.

programme.desc: A strange creature seen in a wooded area of rural Massachusetts by three different people who all give similar descriptions - coincidence, collusion or a genuine mystery?

programme.title: World's Most Unexplained
programme.desc: A hoard of golden coins found in the prospecting district of California and a valuable find in an old piano in rural England. Where did they come from and why weren't they claimed?

programme.title: World's Most Unexplained
programme.desc: 500 years old, almost 300 pages long, full of handwritten notes and illustrations and so far no one can translate a word of it. What is the mysterious book and what secrets does it hold?

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.sub-title: Alien Pilots, Carolina Lights and Stone Cold Animals
programme.desc: Did a man in Turkey capture footage of alien pilots in a UFO cockpit? What are the strange lights repeatedly spotted over Brown Mountain in North Carolina since before the Civil War? Did an Australian man stumble upon an alien corpse on the pavement?

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.sub-title: Mystery Sea Beast, the Earth is Alive and Shapeshifting UFO
programme.desc: Tony Harris and his team of experts examine the clues and make a determination about the validity of the supernatural.

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: A giant letter Z is carved into a Mexican hillside, evoking the mark of a legendary outlaw. Plus, a strange sighting in Germany points to secrets from the Cold War.

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: A strange mass breaches the surface of an ocean near Antarctica, sparking rumours of a mythological sea monster. An area of the US-Mexico border becomes an international mystery. Ancient rock carvings on a remote mountain depict unearthly beings.

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: An amateur archaeologist finds strange symbols scratched into the Kazakhstan desert. CIA surveillance photographs show what appears to be a giant Star of David on the island of Cuba. A lake in the Brazilian rainforest turns bright pink.

programme.title: Ghost Ships
programme.desc: Marrs Island, Nova Scotia was the site of one of the worst civilian maritime disasters in history, with more than 550 casualties. The team is diving in to search for answers to figure out how this tragic accident came to be.

programme.title: Ghost Ships
programme.desc: For more than 200 years, tales of a Phantom Ship have surrounded the waters of Pictou, Nova Scotia: a mysterious ship engulfs in flames and suddenly vanishes. Recently, a charred wooden wreck was discovered in the middle of Pictou Harbour.

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler
programme.desc: Snack on a feast of food horrors from the past: from radioactive energy drinks, to scandalous snacks made with Olestra, to the appalling additives in your milk and bread, we uncover the incredible things people once ate without a second thought.

programme.title: Hitler's Handmaidens
programme.desc: Exploring the many lovers of Adolph Hitler, and charting the unfortunate demise of all who dared resist his love, affection and sexual appetite.

programme.title: Hitler's Secret Sex Life
programme.desc: Four women who had the misfortune of being lusted after by Hitler saw only one way out of the relationship. His beloved niece ended her own life by and a German movie star he associated with fell from a balcony to her death.

programme.title: Weird Britain

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence

programme.desc: The second visit is to Wortwell Hall Barn in Norfolk where husband and wife team Jenny and Clive Aylett strive to be perfect.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit this week is to Bath Lodge Castle in Somerset where hosts Karen and Mike Hepker run a luxury castle experience.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to The Old Lodge Hotel in Gosport, Hampshire, where publicans Mike Pearce and Tash Thorne like to mix business with pleasure.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie start working out with Lou and Carla Ferrigno.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie is shocked to learn the truth about the night she decided to marry Doug, and Danny falls for Holly.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug bumps into his high school football coach, and Arthur loses his senses of sight, hearing and speech.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug encourages builders to wolf-whistle at Carrie so she doesn't feel bad about turning 35.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray hopes the family-themed eulogy he gives for his Uncle Gus will extinguish the sparks of a festering family feud.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert administers IQ tests to Ray and Debra and then tests their reactions to false results.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray must convince Debra of his innocence after a waitress at Nemo's catches his eye.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin must pretend that he is gay for the sake of Frasier's potential new romance.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier hires a temporary replacement for a vacationing Roz, but the woman soon begins to take over his radio show.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles' new girlfriend pushes him and Frasier into competition for a coveted position in their wine club.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier and Roz discover they have a lot in common when they are forced to bunk together at a convention.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Bart pulls a prank on Skinner's weather balloon, his punishment is to help the headmaster with his amateur astronomy. Bart then spots a comet heading straight for Springfield, and unfortunately the scientists' failed attempts to stop it with a missile destroy the only bridge out of town. So the whole town heads for the Flanders' bomb shelter, which has room for almost everyone.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Heavily in debt to Fat Tony, Krusty agrees to set up a clown college. Homer can't resist the opportunity to change career, but he is so convincing as a clown that Fat Tony mistakes him for Krusty.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes a member of the Stonecutters secret society. He has to start at the bottom as Number 908, but then Number 1 sees something on Homer's bottom.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Liam and Patrycja kick off this week's competition at their Harboro Hotel in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire. They treat their guests to an afternoon of pie making, and two B&Bers intrigue everyone when they reveal their hospitality inexperience.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Liam and Patrycja kick off this week's competition at their Harboro Hotel in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire. They treat their guests to an afternoon of pie making, and two B&Bers intrigue everyone when they reveal their hospitality inexperience.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At The Nest Hotel in Hampshire, father and daughter Shane and Emily hope to dazzle with the décor. An afternoon spent at an ancient farm descends into mudslinging, literally. And the hosts end up feeling that they've been done dirty at feedback time.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Visit three this week is to The Queen's Head Inn in Northamptonshire, where B&B novices Simon and Harriet think their old-school village pub will be a hit. But the bacon gets a bashing at breakfast.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At Worlington Hall in Suffolk, married couple Louis and Michael lay on luxurious interiors. Breakfast is an opulent affair and the B&Bers are left hailing their hosts. But one pair are perturbed by Louis and Michael's lavish approach.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In Edinburgh, Kirstie's with Rob and Maria, who want out of their noisy flat and into a harmonious house, while Phil helps James and Lesley find a property that suits their future-proofing requirements.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie revisits Kathleen and Tom, whose Newcastle home was a battleground. When Phil last visited, they'd jumped ship. Have they got the renovation bug again?

programme.desc: Set during World War Two, an awkward young German boy whose only ally is his imaginary friend Hitler has his naïve patriotism tested when he meets a young girl who upends his world views.

When Denise opened Café Hon in 1992 it was a roaring success, but as a result of her unwavering business ambition the local community decided to boycott the restaurant, leaving Denise frustrated by falling sales.

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: Time's running out to save a young couple trapped in an underground cave. But Sam scuppers the rescue mission to buy his crew more time to make a complex foot-based animated movie to keep them entertained while they wait.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel must hire an assistant and agonises over whether to hire an efficient, experienced woman, or sexy young Tag Jones. Ignoring her friends' advice, she hires Tag and soon regrets it. To make matters worse, Tag is attracted to Phoebe.

programme.sub-title: The One With the Engagement Picture

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Nap Partners

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Ross's Library Book
programme.desc: Ross is elated that the university library contains his doctoral dissertation, but he is shocked to discover that it is located in a remote corner frequently used by students having sex. Elsewhere, the tables are turned on Joey when Erin is the one to just want sex and not a relationship.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Doesn't Like Dogs

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With All the Candy

programme.sub-title: The One With the Holiday Armadillo

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Apothecary Table
programme.desc: Joey is on cloud nine when he starts to date Janine, but she doesn't like his friends, and Rachel worries that Phoebe won't appreciate the way she furnishes their apartment.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross and Chandler bicker over which of them created a raunchy joke, Phoebe antagonises Monica and Rachel with her candour, and Joey reluctantly takes a job at Central Perk.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey gets in trouble for giving female customers free food at Central Perk, and after her father cuts her off, Rachel's sister Jill comes to town. Rachel talks Jill into asking Ross out, and later, Ross and Jill return to his apartment. As he closes the drapes, Rachel looks on from Monica and Chandler's apartment.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Can't Cry
programme.desc: Chandler admits that he hasn't cried since he was a child, Phoebe discovers that Ursula is starring in porno movies using her name, and Rachel desperately tries to stop her sister Jill from starting a relationship with Ross.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One That Could Have Been
programme.desc: Rachel tells her friends about Barry and Mindy's impending divorce and wonders what life would have been like if she had married him. This leads the others to speculate how their lives could have turned out too.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One That Could Have Been
programme.desc: In the second episode showing what could have happened to the friends had their lives taken different paths, Carol and Ross decide to have a threesome to spice up their marriage, while Rachel goes to Joey's and kisses him and then catches Barry cheating.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler gets into trouble with his homemade gift for Monica, Ross tries to teach martial arts to Rachel and Phoebe, and Joey hires a look-alike.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Dates a Student
programme.desc: When a fire damages their apartment, Rachel and Phoebe must choose between living temporarily with Joey or Monica. Meanwhile, Ross gets into trouble at work, and Chandler tries to help Joey's career.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross worries when his student girlfriend Liz goes on holiday with her wild friends. Meanwhile, Rachel is desperate to find a date for a charity ball, and Joey's fridge breaks down.

programme.title: Three Men and a Baby
programme.desc: Following the struggles of three carefree Manhattan bachelors who get a crash course in fatherhood when an infant mysteriously appears on their doorstep. A hit remake of the French film `Three Men and a Cradle'.

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The Walshes have reached the final stop on their Latin America road trip as they arrive in Panama - they meet some local indigenous tribes, but things gets competitive between father and son as they join in with some ancestral games. When the pair reach Panama's capital city, the skyscraper skyline is a big clue to what Barney has in store for his dad - and Brad isn't pleased when he finds out that they'll be cleaning the windows of one of those skyscrapers.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Mac and C.H.E.E.S.E.
programme.desc: Joey is excited about his audition for a major television action series about a man and his crimefighting robot, but Chandler almost ruins everything.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Meets Elizabeth's Dad
programme.desc: Ross fails to impress his girlfriend's father who proves tricky to get on with, and Phoebe makes Chandler and Monica paranoid by chronicling their every move in a supposedly fictional book she is writing.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Paul's the Man
programme.desc: Ross accidentally takes Elizabeth to the same cabin where Elizabeth's strict father takes Rachel for a romantic vacation, and Monica panics Chandler by planning their wedding.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Since she is the only one who knows that Chandler plans to ask Monica to marry him, Phoebe helps Chandler shop for a wedding ring, while Rachel's wish for Paul to reveal his emotions creates a new set of problems.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler's romantic marriage proposal is ruined when Monica's former boyfriend returns, Joey accidentally buys a boat, and a dormitory incident reminds Ross how young his girlfriend is.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica is left reeling from Richard's declaration that he loves her and wants to marry her.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Everyone is toasting Chandler and Monica's engagement, but after Chandler fails to come up with the goods in the bedroom, he begins to worry about the consequences. Elsewhere, Monica thinks Rachel is trying to steal her glory when she catches her kissing Ross.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica's dream of a fairytale wedding fizzles out after she learns what her parents have done with her wedding fund. Meanwhile, Rachel fumes when a teasing Joey stumbles across her juicy late-night reading material.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler's desperate effort to bond with Monica's dad by playing racquetball backfires when he accidentally gets too up-close-and-personal. Elsewhere, Rachel tries to teach `landlubber' Joey how to sail without falling overboard, while Monica seeks to replicate Phoebe's late grandmother's secret recipe by deconstructing her last remaining cookie.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.sub-title: The Best Bits of Mr Bean
programme.desc: Loveable buffoon Mr Bean has the unique talent of turning the most ordinary of situations into moments of excruciating embarrassment.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: With Sarah Millican, Micky Flanagan, Georgie Thompson and Louie Spence.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: The first of a two-part compilation of the best bits from the current series. Host Jimmy Carr and team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson play the topical comedy panel show that delves into the world of polls, surveys and statistics in its own unique way. Jimmy oversees the disputes and deliberations on the current events that set the nation's chins wagging with celebrity guests.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha, Wayne, Colin, and Ryan are joined by comedian Jeff Davis for a series of hilarious games, including Questions with Hats, Sound Effects, Scenes from a Hat, Living Scenery, and Hoedown. The Bella twins arrive for a round of Duet.

programme.title: Alan Carr: Spexy Beast Live
programme.desc: After a few years rubbing shoulders with A-list celebrities on his very own chat show, multi award-winning Alan Carr returned to his stand-up roots in 2011 for his first major live comedy tour in four years. Filmed in front of a sold out crowd of 13,000 fans at the Manchester Evening News Arena as part of his 33 date UK and Ireland arena tour, `Spexy Beast' sees Alan back on stage.

programme.title: Dara O'Briain Talks Funny: Live in London
programme.desc: Recorded at the world famous Hammersmith Apollo before 3,300 fans, this is the culmination of Dara's massive 2008 sellout tour of the UK and Ireland. Dara is at his best, mixing top drawer material with lightning-fast improvisation to give his audience yet another hilarious night to remember.

programme.title: Jack Dee: Live At The Apollo
programme.desc: He's glum. He wears nice suits. And he's back. Deadpan comic Jack Dee captured in live performance at London's Hammersmith Apollo.

programme.title: Fat Chat
programme.desc: Desiree Burch welcomes comedian Sofie Hagen into her dreamy diner. Together they lament the struggles of plane seatbelt extenders and discuss Sofie hooking up with someone her neighbour.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers steal America's babies at the mall; while they lie in wait trying to succeed in an impossible task, Sal, Q and Murr hash on some never before seen clips.

programme.title: Utopia
programme.desc: The Promise Land. The Government stalls the NBA moving to independent status and the office undergoes respect training, complicating a romance between Nat and a visiting consultant. (S5, E03)

programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. A murderous wife pleads for sympathy; a virtual DUI hearing goes from joking to screaming; a defendant's angry brother must be removed from the courtroom; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments: A TikTok star is on trial for murder; a lawyer gets Tasered; a teen mum faces multiple felonies; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A convicted cop killer goes on a f-bomb tirade in court; a defendant reveals his fandom for the judge before that same judge admonishes him for bad behaviour in virtual court; the family of a murder victim lashes out at the killer - a family friend.

programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments: A mother asks the judge to sterilize her murderous daughter; a French tourist is in trouble for writing bad checks; a grandma forgives her grandson's killer; and more.

programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. A judge gets temporarily suspended after making a teenager wear handcuffs and prison garb after falling asleep in court; a man arrested for stalking hurls insults at the prosecutor.

programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.sub-title: Meatballs With a Chance of Poison
programme.desc: A traffic stop leads to a shocking arrest; a driver flees an accident with a man clinging to the hood of her car; a man tries to poison his nephew's sandwich.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A man dressed as a chicken claiming to be tripping on mushrooms; a woman attempts to use a police car as her taxi to the bar; The Naked Cowboy is arrested for panhandling in Florida; and more!

programme.title: Snapped: Behind Bars
programme.desc: A remorseful Pandora returns; her son Cody Henderson speaks out, revealing why he took part in a crime that landed him in prison for life and how he feels about the mother who turned on him.

programme.title: The Real Murders of Atlanta
programme.desc: When an Atlanta-area horse trainer abruptly vanishes from his ranch, police search for the missing father-to-be, ultimately discovering a salacious secret where untamed passions may have led to the victim's untimely demise.

programme.title: The Real Murders of Orange County
programme.desc: When an ambitious college student is stabbed to death after a campus concert, the brutality of the attack leads police to believe it must have been personal; the resolution nine years later, however, proves darker than anyone could have imagined.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: A brutal attack on two employees of a high-end shop leaves one woman dead and another scarred by the memory of the events she survived. As detectives make sense of the horrific tale, bizarre clues bring them to a shocking truth.

programme.title: Crime in Progress
programme.desc: A routine mail route turns deadly when a beloved postal worker is murdered in broad daylight. With body-worn cameras rolling, police and federal agents race to uncover the truth - and what they find leads to shocking arrests.

programme.title: Interview With a Killer
programme.desc: Tyler Hadley discusses how he, as a troubled 17-year-old, bludgeoned his mother and father to death with a hammer.

programme.title: Predator Hunters
programme.desc: Det. Tony Godwin catfishes a predator grooming a woman to supply her 9-year-old niece for sex. Then, an offender makes a chilling admission following a tense takedown. Detectives scramble to stop a predator with access to vulnerable kids.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw
programme.desc: After the unusual death of a local businessman, police become suspicious of his disgruntled wife, whose strange behaviour and statements make her the prime suspect in the shooting.

programme.title: I Met My Murderer Online
programme.desc: A woman named Sydney goes on a date with a woman she met on a dating app and is reported missing the following day. Investigators try to find the woman Sydney met up with.

programme.title: I Met My Murderer Online
programme.desc: Xixi, a beautiful young heiress from China, meets Jordan Matthews, a chef, on a dating app. The two fall in love and move into an apartment together, but things take a dark turn soon after.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: After a teenager mysteriously disappears, police must determine if a secret meeting with a young man led to her murder.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: When a teenager is found savagely stabbed to death in her home, police hope a trail of blood found at the crime scene will lead them to her killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: A young woman's disappearance marks the beginning of a heartbreaking murder mystery. Will a clue discovered by a child be the key to catching his mother's killer?

programme.title: Killer Britain With Dermot Murnaghan
programme.desc: Dermot Murnaghan explores British murder stories filled with detective intrigue and chilling storylines of homicide and hate. The five murder stories are told with archived footage and key interviews from those closest to the case.

programme.title: Killer Britain With Dermot Murnaghan
programme.desc: Dermot Murnaghan explores British murder stories filled with detective intrigue and chilling storylines of homicide and hate. The five murder stories are told with archived footage and key interviews from those closest to the case.

programme.title: Cops Gone Bad With Will Mellor
programme.desc: In the middle of the night, police and paramedics are called to what they are told is a devastating car accident. A young woman is in the driver's seat with horrific head injuries, yet her fiancé, police officer Martin Alex Forshaw, is barely hurt.

programme.title: Cops Gone Bad With Will Mellor
programme.desc: A police car executes a stop and search on a drugs courier. The cop who stops the car finds a bag with hundreds of thousands of pounds inside and seizes it as the proceeds of crime. Instead of arresting the driver, the police officer lets him go.

programme.title: #Dead2Me
programme.desc: #Dead2Me tells the stories of the love between two people which turns to loathing - and ends in Murder. Ours is a narrative fuelled by a tapestry of emotions. The stories are told by those who knew a killer without realising it.

programme.title: #Dead2Me
programme.desc: Dawn Walker met Thomas Nutt online, and from the very beginning he tried to control every aspect of her life. He manipulated her into marriage, and their wedding day was the last time Dawn's family would see her alive.

programme.title: When Missing Turns to Murder
programme.desc: Chronicling the desperate search for Carole Packman, who disappeared in 1985 after leaving a note to say she was leaving the family home for good. With the help of the police, they discover her disappearance wasn't as honest as it was first believed.

programme.title: When Missing Turns to Murder
programme.desc: Danielle Jones, aged 15, was last seen on June 18, 2001, near her home in East Tilbury, Essex. Her uncle became a suspect, where a search of his house led police to a pair of white stockings stained with blood. Her mother speaks about her murder.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: An account of the car bomb carried out by the IRA which killed 29 people in Omagh on 15 August 1998.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: A look at the murder of 18-year-old Sally Anne Bowman, who was stabbed in Croydon in 2005. With interviews with Bowman's family and detectives who solved the case.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw
programme.desc: Detectives hope a woman can identify her attacker as she fights for her life after being shot in the face, and investigators race to get a confession after a man is gunned down in a motel car park.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw
programme.desc: A young woman vanishes after a night out at a local bar and investigators race against the clock to track down her final movements, eventually locating a potential suspect who is anything but honest.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw
programme.desc: After the unusual death of a local businessman, police become suspicious of his disgruntled wife, whose strange behaviour and statements make her the prime suspect in the shooting.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Though wedded couples vow to stay together until death do they part, a look at what happens when a groom or bride causes their beloved's death.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West
programme.desc: When Pam Shelly, 31, is found in her Cuero, Texas bathroom with a fatal gunshot wound to the head, her death is initially ruled a suicide. Yet, a tenacious investigator's instincts and his suspicion of foul play eventually cracks the case wide open.

programme.title: The Death Investigator With Barbara Butcher
programme.desc: When a rubbish bag containing a young woman's body is dumped in a NYC tunnel, Barbara Butcher and a rookie homicide detective unravel how a seemingly straightforward crime conceals a chain of forensic contradictions - and a killer no one saw coming.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: 23-year-old teacher Irene Garza was a former beauty queen and devout Catholic who vanished the evening before Easter. Residents of her close-knit border town did their best to find her, but her body was found floating in a drainage canal.

programme.title: Crime in Progress
programme.desc: A routine mail route turns deadly when a beloved postal worker is murdered in broad daylight. With body-worn cameras rolling, police and federal agents race to uncover the truth - and what they find leads to shocking arrests.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks
programme.desc: When 31-year-old Linda Slaten is brutally strangled in her Lakeland, Fla., home in 1981, a complex web of suspects emerges; the case takes a dramatic turn when a DNA hit exposes the sinister underbelly of a seemingly peaceful community.

programme.title: Rob Rinder: The Crime I Can't Forget
programme.desc: Rob Rinder continues looking back on the unsolved murder of Lucy Hargreaves. He travels to London to meet his lead defence counsel from the trial and talk to Peter Bleksley, who's spent years tracking the fugitive wanted for Lucy's murder.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder
programme.desc: Found with a gunshot wound to her chest, a woman's family seeks justice for 20 years after the would-be murder suspect proclaims suicide.

programme.desc: #Dead2Me tells the stories of the love between two people which turns to loathing - and ends in Murder. Ours is a narrative fuelled by a tapestry of emotions. The stories are told by those who knew a killer without realising it.

programme.title: #Dead2Me
programme.desc: Dawn Walker met Thomas Nutt online, and from the very beginning he tried to control every aspect of her life. He manipulated her into marriage, and their wedding day was the last time Dawn's family would see her alive.

programme.title: When Missing Turns to Murder
programme.desc: Chronicling the desperate search for Carole Packman, who disappeared in 1985 after leaving a note to say she was leaving the family home for good. With the help of the police, they discover her disappearance wasn't as honest as it was first believed.

programme.title: When Missing Turns to Murder
programme.desc: Danielle Jones, aged 15, was last seen on June 18, 2001, near her home in East Tilbury, Essex. Her uncle became a suspect, where a search of his house led police to a pair of white stockings stained with blood. Her mother speaks about her murder.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: An account of the car bomb carried out by the IRA which killed 29 people in Omagh on 15 August 1998.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: A look at the murder of 18-year-old Sally Anne Bowman, who was stabbed in Croydon in 2005. With interviews with Bowman's family and detectives who solved the case.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw
programme.desc: Detectives hope a woman can identify her attacker as she fights for her life after being shot in the face, and investigators race to get a confession after a man is gunned down in a motel car park.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw
programme.desc: A young woman vanishes after a night out at a local bar and investigators race against the clock to track down her final movements, eventually locating a potential suspect who is anything but honest.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw
programme.desc: After the unusual death of a local businessman, police become suspicious of his disgruntled wife, whose strange behaviour and statements make her the prime suspect in the shooting.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Though wedded couples vow to stay together until death do they part, a look at what happens when a groom or bride causes their beloved's death.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West
programme.desc: When Pam Shelly, 31, is found in her Cuero, Texas bathroom with a fatal gunshot wound to the head, her death is initially ruled a suicide. Yet, a tenacious investigator's instincts and his suspicion of foul play eventually cracks the case wide open.

programme.title: The Death Investigator With Barbara Butcher
programme.desc: When a rubbish bag containing a young woman's body is dumped in a NYC tunnel, Barbara Butcher and a rookie homicide detective unravel how a seemingly straightforward crime conceals a chain of forensic contradictions - and a killer no one saw coming.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: 23-year-old teacher Irene Garza was a former beauty queen and devout Catholic who vanished the evening before Easter. Residents of her close-knit border town did their best to find her, but her body was found floating in a drainage canal.

programme.title: Crime in Progress
programme.desc: A routine mail route turns deadly when a beloved postal worker is murdered in broad daylight. With body-worn cameras rolling, police and federal agents race to uncover the truth - and what they find leads to shocking arrests.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks
programme.desc: When 31-year-old Linda Slaten is brutally strangled in her Lakeland, Fla., home in 1981, a complex web of suspects emerges; the case takes a dramatic turn when a DNA hit exposes the sinister underbelly of a seemingly peaceful community.

programme.title: Rob Rinder: The Crime I Can't Forget
programme.desc: Rob Rinder continues looking back on the unsolved murder of Lucy Hargreaves. He travels to London to meet his lead defence counsel from the trial and talk to Peter Bleksley, who's spent years tracking the fugitive wanted for Lucy's murder.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers

programme.desc: Richard redesigns his horsebox into an RV for the Cog racing team. Mindy and Neil put on a Cog calendar photo-shoot. Kamla and Richard debate whether racing can continue but Anthony wants to prove it's not a waste of money.

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Workshop
programme.desc: With plans for a live restoration at CarFest to restore the cog's mojo, as well as a new girlfriend for `Oliver', Richard has concerns for the workshop's prospects. Even with a higher rate job in hand, the future doesn't look certain.

programme.title: Wrench'd
programme.desc: The crew gets to work transforming the engine of a 1963 VW Bug into a post-apocalyptic-inspired bare-metal trike. Plus, Justin finally completes his overhaul of the prized 1962 Jeep.

programme.title: Wrench'd
programme.desc: Justin and the team work on a 1941 Ford truck that is ready for an overhaul. Plus, Justin takes a 2014 Chevy 1500 to the next level with an impressive custom paint job.

programme.title: Wrench'd
programme.desc: A high-roller client brings the team it's biggest job to date, turning a 1969 Saab 99 into a fully custom race car. Plus, a 1963 C10 gets a total overhaul and makeover.

programme.desc: RV icon Winnebago Industries builds their most luxurious venture to date. Plus, experience the trek towards outer space via the historic NASA Astrovans.

programme.title: Extreme Car Hoarders
programme.desc: Chuck and Rick are stranded in Mexico when a plan to bring a 1950 Ford Mercury back to life becomes overambitious.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.desc: Joe Martin is ready to upgrade a special car in his collection, a '60 Impala that's been collecting dust for nearly 25 years; Joe and the guys get to work, but with a new X-frame and engine comes a whole lot of problems.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.desc: Joe gets to work on upgrades to his '60 Impala with a new frame and engine; Mandi selects a '49 Buick to sell to fund the build, and Uncle Bill helps to get it sale-ready; it's time for Joe and Mandi to check out the updated ride with its new stance.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.sub-title: Big Wheels, Big Engine - '55 Big Window Truck
programme.desc: Danny and Penny Cobbs own an award-winning '55 big-window truck, but it doesn't run; they need Joe Martin to get this showstopper on the road; the team plans an engine swap and some other cool updates, including a killer, new set of wheels.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.desc: Mandi and Shag have a lead on a '70s step van, which Joe and the team will transform for a fan's whiskey business; the crew must find a new hood for a '54 Chrysler New Yorker wagon that matches the fit, paint and patina of the original.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.desc: Joe and the team continue transforming the '70s step van into a rolling billboard for a whiskey company; the body gets an extreme makeover; Joe works on the van's artwork; a local customer stops by for some help on his 1950 Chevy pickup truck.

programme.title: Shed & Buried
programme.desc: The pursuit of profit sees Henry and Fuzz rummaging through Rebecca and Sue's sheds near Newark. It's home to all manner of vehicles and parts.

programme.title: Shed & Buried
programme.desc: Motorcycle fanatic Henry Cole travels around the country with his mechanic mate Fuzz Townshend nosing around people's sheds and garages in the hope of finding some automotive bargains.

programme.title: Shed & Buried

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: The 2002 Mercedes Benz E55 AMG, the pinnacle of luxury and supercar performance. Can Mike find profit in a neglected example as Ant tackles a major service?

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil is preoccupied by a chirping smoke alarm, while Claire and Haley spend some quality time together.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon heads to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he visits Amy's Baking Company and meets husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who reveal a shocking contempt for customer feedback.

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels in the USA, aiming to fix hopeless hotels, mediocre motels and bed & breakfasts with bad standards. In the first programme, Gordon visits Coeur d'Alene, Idaho, to try to rescue the failing Roosevelt Inn. Despite being over a million dollars in debt, the Roosevelt's owner, John Hough, is more interested in telling jokes and dressing up as Sherlock Holmes than he is in fixing his struggling B&B.

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Cambridge, New York, where ex-military man John Imhof and his wife, Tina, own and operate the allegedly haunted Cambridge Hotel.

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: The first part of a two-part visit to the Juniper Hill Inn in Windsor, Vermont, a place that looks like a million dollars but smells of raw sewage. Gordon meets the inn's wealthy owner, Robert Dean II, and uncovers some shocking treatment towards the staff. Gordon quickly realises that it's going to need something approaching a miracle if he's going to have a chance of saving the place.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In the north east of England, Kevin and Lalita's hearty portions prove a challenge. Michelle and Charlotte host with an Asian theme. And Richard and Christine serve dinner party classics.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Lara and Greg serve a travel-inspired menu. Andrew and Liz attempt a dress rehearsal for their wedding breakfast. And Jenna and Mitch prove that looks can be deceptive.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Hardworking Hayley is plunged out of her depth when she hands over control of her big day to a man with a crazy underwater plan. Her fiance Ian has just three weeks and £12,000 to pull off the wedding of a lifetime. Working as a sports physio, Hayley dreams of hanging up her tracksuit and becoming a gypsy princess, but hopeless romantic Ian wants to throw her in at the deep end of their local leisure centre.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Liverpool lad Terry plans a wedding in three weeks for Northern Irish beauty, Melissa. While controlling bride Melissa dreams of a traditional Irish wedding, happy-go-lucky Terry's a Ghanaian Scouser with grand plans to celebrate his African roots. After disastrous efforts to plan their wedding together, Melissa fears that unless she hands control over to Terry they will split up for good.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Another brave bride leaves the most important day of her life in the hands of the man she loves. Fun-loving prison officer Noel has three weeks to plan a wedding for his long-suffering bride-to-be, Jemma. Happy-go-lucky Noel and prison teacher Jemma first met two years ago and less than a year into their relationship Jemma fell pregnant unexpectedly.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Professional wrestler Mike wants to plan a knockout wedding for his bride-to-be Becky, while she yearns for a girlyfest full of style and elegance. They haven't been together long, but Mike wants to prove to Becky how much he loves her and in return Becky is trusting him with £12,000 and her dream wedding.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Some of the brides recall their nuptials and get their own back on the grooms for dropping wedding clangers with a yuletide set of embarrassing forfeits.

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: True Value CEO John Hartmann, a former FBI agent, goes under cover and is shocked by the antics of an employee.

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Pittsburgh Mayor Bill Peduto tackles undercover roles of municipal employees including a refuse worker, a carpenter and a self-sufficiency coordinator.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon visits Los Angeles, California, to save La Serenata, a family-owned Mexican restaurant that has been an LA staple for over three decades. Gordon and his team have just 24 hours to update the dining room and plan smaller more dynamic menu.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: In this episode, Gordon Ramsay travels to Wichita, Kansas in an attempt to save Fetch Bistro, the first dog-friendly restaurant in the state.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: At Hermosa Beach in California, Gordon attempts to save Patrick Molloy's, a family-owned Irish pub, by refurbishing the dining room and creating a simplified and delicious menu.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: At Sacramento in California, Gordon helps out BBQ and seafood restaurant Sandra Dee's. He and his team have just 24 hours to renovate the premises by updating the 20-year-old dining room's faded decor and overhauling the kitchen and menu.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits classic Cajun-inspired restaurant the Trolley Stop Café, located in the heart of New Orleans, Louisiana, to clean and remodel the interior and revamp the menu.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr, Susie Dent and Rachel Riley host a compilation of best bits from the anarchic letters and numbers game, featuring Sean Lock, Bob Mortimer, Harry Hill, Joe Lycett, Jon Richardson, Lucy Beaumont, Katherine Ryan and more.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts as Alan Carr and Harriet Kemsley play against Jonathan Ross and Maisie Adam. Huge Davies joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. With Rachel Riley.

programme.title: Russell Howard & Mum: USA Road Trip
programme.desc: Russell and his mum head to Portland, Oregon where cannabis is legal to use recreationally. As their trip quite literally goes to pot, will Ninette have a go on the demon weed?

programme.title: Russell Howard & Mum: USA Road Trip
programme.desc: Russell and his mum arrive in Las Vegas to help judge the legendary Mrs Globe Beauty Pageant. However, Russell must first understand what it takes to be a beauty queen.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts a brand-new series of the topical panel show with new team captains Rob Beckett and Aisling Bea. In this show, Rob and Aisling are joined in their quest to uncover the nation's most popular talking points by First Date's love guru Fred Siriex and This Is England actor Thomas Turgoose.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr is joined by new team captains Rob Beckett and Aisling Bea and guests Melanie Melanie C, Drifters' star Jesicca Knappett and comedians Joe Wilkinson and Tom Allen to discuss the topics that set the great British public's chins wagging.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Rosie yearns for a classy, fairy tale wedding, but groom Nick wants to throw a Christmas-themed event, despite his bride-to-be's unhappy associations with the festive season.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Brides get their own back for wedding clangers with a range of forfeits for the grooms.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride Ireland
programme.desc: Brazilian Eduardo and Polish born Paulina met in Dublin five years ago and are complete opposites. Paulina is a girly girl and Eduardo is more into his adrenaline sports and drinking with the lads! In spite of their differences, it's clear that Paulina and Eduardo are mad about each other.

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: When Maaco President Jose Costa goes under cover, he gets overheated after finding an employee is cutting corners.

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Phenix Salon Inc founder Gina Rivera must complete a pedicure and a straight-razor shave while undercover.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Sheffield, Ray and Chloe, Andrew and Claire, and Rob and Emma compete in a week featuring dinner party beginners, kitchen mishaps and Mr Bean impressions.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Young couple Hannah and Luke kick off the competition in Brighton with an ambitiously trendy menu. Day two sees more experienced hosts Karen and Mark step up to the plate, and last to host are Rachel and TJ.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Brighton, David and Liz serve crowd-pleasers with a twist. James and Paul make their evening personal. And Martin and Lorena host a Spanish fiesta.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon updates the interior of Shanty on 19th, an iconic restaurant in the West End theatre district of Allentown, Pennsylvania, as a bright and airy contemporary bistro.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon visits Vasi's Restaurant and Bar, a family-owned eatery in Waterbury, Connecticut, to remodel the dated interior as an inviting Mediterranean seaside taverna.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon visits Catfish Cabin in Memphis, Tennessee, which offers traditional, Southern-style fare, to remodel the dark interior with sleek new furniture and fixtures.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon is at Stone's Throw, a family-owned fine dining restaurant on the Housatonic River in Seymour, Connecticut, to redecorate the drab interior and update the menu.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon visits Bayou on the Vine, a family-run Cajun restaurant in Kansas City, Missouri, where he redecorates the premises with a jazz theme and upgrades the menu.

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: Amy Gledhill tears her hair out, Joel Dommett sniffs the contents of a vacuum and Kumail Nanjiani trims a cat. Once the dust, lint and fur have settled, our champion is crowned.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the words and numbers game show mash-up, with `Countdown' regulars Rachel Riley and Susie Dent. Jonathan Ross and Russell Kane take on Alan Carr and Judi Love. Josh Jones is in Dictionary Corner.

programme.title: Russell Howard & Mum: USA Road Trip
programme.desc: Russell and his mum are in LA and they are ready to rock. They will have 48hours at the Rock and Roll Fantasy Camp to become full blown guitar heroes and perform in Hollywood.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats

programme.desc: Nathan was worried he'd made a grave mistake by planning a Mexican Day of the Dead wedding for demanding bride Jenna. Nathan, best man Kennedy, Jenna, and bridesmaid Lucy relive the big decisions that led to his frightful fiesta.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.sub-title: The Most Handsome Boy on the Planet
programme.desc: Barry is excited when a modelling representative approaches him in the mall, but Erica thinks it's a scam. Meanwhile, Adam tries to mend fences between Murray and his dad.

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: LEGO Masters: Australia vs The World
programme.desc: The teams create iconic vehicles for notorious Batman villains, from The Joker to Harley Quinn. Whose badass build will send them to the semi-final?

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
